monitor_the_situation.title: US Expands Airstrikes Across Southern Iran After Ceasefire Collapses
Iran Strikes US Bases in Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Jordan With Missiles and Drones
US Strikes Over 170 Iranian Targets, Kills 14 in Two-Day Campaign

— S4 · Conflict · Iran · 3d ago. The US hit over 170 Iranian military targets across two nights, killing 14 and injuring 78. Trump ended the ceasefire, and CENTCOM targeted air defense, missile sites, and coastal radar.
Iran Ramps Up Regional Pressure After Renewed US Strikes

— S3 · Conflict · Iran · 17m ago. Iran increases pressure by targeting US allies and threatening American bases after fresh US strikes during Khamenei's funeral, aiming to force Washington back to negotiations.
